explanations.1: SHELL:=bash sets which command interpreter (bash) will run the commands in this Makefile.
explanations.5: COLOR_YELLOW:=33 is storing the ANSI color code number for yellow text, which will be used later to colorize output.
explanations.8: .PHONY: help tells Make that 'help' is a fake target (not a real file), so it will always run even if a file named 'help' exists.
explanations.12: @clear runs the clear command silently (@ suppresses printing the command itself before executing it).
explanations.14: This awk command parses the Makefile to find lines with '##' comments and formats them nicely; the $$ means 'use a literal $ in the output' because Make interprets single $ as variable syntax.
